name: Australian Pull-Up
instructions: Position a bar, table, or sturdy surface at about waist height. Stand facing the bar and grip it with both hands slightly wider than shoulder-width, using an overhand grip.

Walk your feet forward and lean back until your body is straight and at an angle, with your heels on the ground and arms fully extended. Your body should form a straight line from head to heels. This is the starting position.
Keeping your body rigid, pull your chest up to the bar by bending your elbows and retracting your shoulder blades. Breathe out as you pull up.
Pause briefly when your chest touches or nearly reaches the bar.
Slowly lower yourself back to the starting position with arms fully extended. Breathe in on the way down.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
